blocks.text: Built an end-to-end LLM pipeline that ingests 20,000+ product reviews and outputs structured themes, sentiment, and feature requests for product decision-making.
Product teams couldn't systematically mine large review corpora. Manual tagging was slow and inconsistent; generic sentiment tools lacked product-specific structure.
Designed chunked ingestion and schema-constrained generation
Built automated evals for JSON validity and faithfulness to source text
Iterated prompts and post-processing until outputs were reliably machine-consumable
Analysis compressed from hours to minutes per batch run
